heading: Omitted
label: 123a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which established the basic annual compensation of the coordinator, Joint Recording Facility, has been omitted because of section 4131() of this title which abolished the Joint Recording Facility positions and salaries established pursuant to the Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1948, and all subsequent acts.act Aug. 5, 1955, ch. 568, § 169 Stat. 500l
